message:
🐛 Fix generator quality: cross-repo PRs, boilerplate, language detection (#521)

- Filter out linked PRs from forks/different repos (caused wrong resolutions)
- Strip PR contribution guidelines boilerplate ("For first time contributors...")
- Strip "Please provide a description of this PR" template text
- Strip orphaned "cc" prefixes left after @mention removal
- Add basic non-English detection (stopword ratio heuristic)
- Reject missions with empty/fallback-only resolutions
- Filter code snippets containing casual comments (@mentions, "yay thanks")
- Filter sentence fragments without code characters from snippets
- Normalize \r\n line endings in code snippets
- Add "unable", "cannot", "doesn't work" to troubleshoot detection
- Improve difficulty scoring for multi-component/advanced scenarios
  (CNI chaining, BPF/eBPF, multi-cloud, encryption)
- Pass project context to extractResourceKinds in buildMissionJson

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
